title: Odds against rate cuts high as new US Fed chair set for swearing in

title: Galaxy secures New York BitLicense to expand institutional crypto services
summary: The NYDFS approvals allow GalaxyOne Prime NY to offer trading and financing services to institutional investors in one of the most tightly regulated US crypto markets.

title: Oil Slips, US Stock Futures Rise on Iran Optimism: Markets Wrap
summary: Oil dropped and US equity-index futures edged up after President Donald Trump said he was holding off on fresh military strikes, boosting hopes for a deal that could end the war and revive energy flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Gold Extends Gain as Hopes for Iran Truce Ease Inflation Fears
summary: Gold extended a gain as the prospect of a US-Iran ceasefire deal eased some inflationary concerns that have weighed on bullion.
